data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of transferring classes to a friend, but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the transferability of classes, there is no evidence of its implementation or validation in the saga steps. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary functionality to support the transfer process is not demonstrated.
gaps: No evidence of the functionality allowing the transfer of classes to a friend being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for class transfer validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system allows a user to transfer remaining classes to a friend.
